ogTitle: Pellew Islands vs Peppimenarti: Climate Safety

heading: Pellew Islands vs Peppimenarti — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pellew Islands, Northern Territory and Peppimenarti, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pellew Islands has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Peppimenarti (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pellew Islands or Peppimenarti safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pellew Islands has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Peppimenarti scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pellew Islands scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Peppimenarti scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pellew Islands or Peppimenarti?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pellew Islands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
